theme_and_archetype.primary_archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Neo-Brutalist contrast
theme_and_archetype.description: A calm, grounded, and high-contrast design system. It uses soft organic base colors combined with strictly defined, high-contrast borders and typography to ensure complete legibility and WCAG 2.2 AAA compliance without appearing clinical or infantilizing.

headings.description: Friendly, geometric, and distinct sans-serif that avoids the 'generic AI' look.

body.description: Specifically designed for low vision, ensuring highly distinct characters (e.g., l, 1, I, O, 0).

scale.note: Base font size must be scalable and larger than typical apps to accommodate low-vision users natively.

rules: Ensure body text maintains a contrast ratio of ≥7:1 against its background (WCAG AAA).
Maintain loose line-height (leading-relaxed) for all body copy to aid neurodivergent reading.

light_default.description: Warm Sand Base with Deep Forest Green. Organic, friendly, high contrast.

true_high_contrast.description: Pure black and white with yellow highlights.

calm_low_stim.description: Soft blue-grey base with muted, readable accents. Avoids pure white or pure black.

dark_mode.description: Deep grey base with high-visibility cyan accents.

grids.gameplay: One-action-at-a-time focus. Use center flex layouts or pure linear flows. No complex sidebars.

rules: Containers with borders MUST use internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Do not center paragraphs; always left-align for easier reading.

cards.style: Neo-brutalist tactile approach. Solid backgrounds matching theme base, thick border (border-2 or border-4) matching --border-color, and a hard drop shadow (e.g., shadow-[8px_8px_0px_var(--border-color)]) to create a definitive, undeniable click boundary.

buttons.style: Large, chunky buttons. Minimum height 64px (h-16). Thick border, solid colors.
buttons.states: Hover must shift to a noticeably different shade while preserving contrast. Focus must have a 4px offset outline using the --focus-ring color.

accessibility_panel.style: Fixed overlay or expansive dialog using Shadcn UI. Needs massive toggles/sliders for text size, contrast modes, motion reduction, captions, TTS speed, and switch-scan mode.

game_tiles.style: Aspect-square or tall bento cards. Needs distinct SVG icons (use Lucide React or Phosphor), clear H3 headings, and an explicit 'Play' button inside the card for screen readers.

accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 56px by 56px for all interactive elements.
accessibility.focus_rings: Mandatory 3px or 4px solid outline with 2px offset for keyboard navigation. No zero-outline styles allowed.
accessibility.aria: All buttons, images, and state changes must have ARIA labels. Use aria-live='polite' for game feedback and TTS.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. No flashing above 3Hz. Standard transitions should be subtle (opacity/transform) and slow (duration-200 or 300).
accessibility.cues: Do NOT rely on color or sound alone. Every audio cue must have a text/visual caption. Every color change must have a text/icon equivalent.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

media.icons_library: lucide-react (use thick stroke-width like 2.5 or 3 for high visibility)

image_urls.description: A warm, inviting, abstract background with soft undulating organic shapes in warm sand, deep forest green, and terracotta. Use for the lobby or hero section in the 'Calm Low-Stimulation' or 'Light Default' themes.
A bold, ultra-high contrast abstract graphic with pure black, striking yellow, and white geometric shapes. Use for the 'True High-Contrast' theme background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Outfit' and 'Atkinson Hyperlegible' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement the 4 distinct color themes as CSS variables in index.css and a ThemeProvider context to toggle them.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the Lobby layout (Bento grid) and Game screens to ensure maximum layout freedom and semantic ARIA compliance.

Use Shadcn UI primarily for complex logical components: the Accessibility Settings Dialog/Sheet, Selects (for language), and Sliders (TTS speed). Heavily customize Shadcn elements to meet the 64px tap target and thick border requirements.
All game screens must enforce 'one-action-at-a-time'. Do not clutter game screens with unnecessary navigation besides a clear 'Back/Exit' button and a 'Help' button.
Ensure the application includes a robust LocalStorage setup to save progress and accessibility settings.
Use standard tags with alt text for the media URLs provided. Do not use background images where important visual context is needed.
Include data-testid on every interactive button, link, and input.
